title: CRISPR-HAWK model and weight files for on-target and off-target scoring
author: Kumbara, Alisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This archive contains all external model files and pretrained weights required by the CRISPR-HAWK framework to compute guide RNA scoring metrics. It includes resources for multiple integrated scoring methods, such as Azimuth, CFD, CRISPRon, DeepCpf1, Elevation, PLM-CRISPR, and sgDesigner.
steps_raw: This archive contains all external model files and pretrained weights required by the CRISPR-HAWK framework to compute guide RNA scoring metrics. It includes resources for multiple integrated scoring methods, such as Azimuth, CFD, CRISPRon, DeepCpf1, Elevation, PLM-CRISPR, and sgDesigner.
